buginformation.summary: [JUnit 5] Update to JUnit 5.8.1
buginformation.description:
JUnit 5.8.1 has been released on September 22, 2021: https://junit.org/junit5/docs/5.8.1/release-notes/
JDT should update to JUnit 5.8.1.

buginformation.summary: [refactoring] Refactor SurroundWithTryWithResouresRefacatoring to jdt.core.manipulation
buginformation.description: jdt.ls requires SurroundWithTryWithResourcesRefactoring

buginformation.summary: [16] [quickfix] Provide quick fix to create a new Record when suggesting new types
buginformation.description:
From Java 16 Records are a standard feature.
While suggesting new type creation in quick fixes for missing types, we suggest Class , interface but do not suggest Record. We will need to add support to provide quickfix for new Record too.

buginformation.summary: Add serial version ID generates empty comment
[quickfix] Add try-with-resources quick fix for possible unclosed resource error
NewClassWizard should throw an error if record is selected as a super class
buginformation.description: In a NewClassWizard, selecting a Record as a super class should throw an error as a Record is final and cannot be extended.

buginformation.summary: NewClassWizard should throw an error if a final class is selected as a super class
buginformation.description: In a NewClassWizard, selecting a final class as a super class should throw an error as it cannot be extended.

buginformation.summary: [quick assist] SurroundWithTryWithResources fails inside blocks and when anonymous classes used
[type filters] Missing proposals in Swing, etc. because of java.awt.* type filter enabled by default
Preference ) Editor ) Content-Assist auto-activation triggers text is too narrow
buginformation.description: Preference ) Editor ) Content-Assist auto-activation triggers text is too narrow and hides most of the chars in some cases.

buginformation.summary: Create a java type/member filter editing component
buginformation.description:
JDT contains a couple of preference pages, dialogs where Java type/member filters can be configured. For example in : JUnitPreferencePage,TypeFilterPreferencePage,JavaStepFilterPreferencePage,SelectImportsDialog,ExceptionFilterEditor
The visible behavior is more or less the same, however there are slight differences between them: * Is it possible to add a new filter manually, without package/type selector? Is it happens in a new dialog, or inline in the table? * Is it possible to edit a filter? In a dialog or inline? * How the results are stored? ** In IPreferenceStorage under two keys, with the values separated by ',' or by ';' ** In some other structure * Does it show icons in the table for packages/types? * Does it handle pressing the delete button? * Does it maintain inactive filters too, or just has active ones?
Creating a dedicated component would: * improve the user experience * reduce the amount of code to maintain, and make it more easy to develop new features

buginformation.summary: Add toString() to MethodCall and MethodWrapper
buginformation.description: Useful while debugging Call Hierarchy Co, like bug 533524 changes. I will push a trivial patch.

buginformation.summary: Convert hard-coded char delimiter as string applying "Join" cleanup
[quickfix] Surround with try-with-resources duplicated
buginformation.description: The new quickfix for resource leaks to surround with try-with-resources is also offered as a quick assist so is duplicated when using CTRL-1.

buginformation.summary: Problems View freeze on git rebase.
buginformation.description:
Created attachment 287348 VisualVM screenshot.png
The user restarted eclipse after waiting for minutes. Samples where taken for a half minute. The samples where taken on windows, but similar stacktraces where reported for gtk in bug 450663#c7. However the general symptoms of bug 450663 are different.
In thread "Worker-106" we see jgits IndexChangedEvent. In thread "main" we see ProblemMarkerManager.runPendingUpdates() updating the Problems View for extended period of time.
Autobuild was enabled during rebase and my guess is a lot of jdt problems occurred during rebase. The Problems View was on default settings to show only 100 items.
The main focus should be to get rid of the UI freeze even if the problem view update might be slow.

buginformation.summary: [refactoring] Refactor TypeAnnotationRewrite to jdt.core.manipulation
buginformation.description: Move TypeAnnotationRewrite to jdt.core.manipulation for use by jdt.ls.

buginformation.summary: Add org.assertj.core.api.Assertions to JDT favorites
buginformation.description:
AssertJ is (one of) the most popular Assert frameworks. I suggest we add org.assertj.core.api.Assertions as favorite to the JDT preferences. AFAIK this is almost no negative side-effects and will help developer using this framework.
Similar to BUg 562639 in which we did this for Mockito.

buginformation.summary: [releng] Files with CR-LF as line endings
buginformation.description:
There are three source files in JDT UI that use CR-LF line endings. Two of these even use mixed line endings (the majority of lines terminated by LF, a few by CR-LF).
I suggest to normalize these files to use LF as line ending.

buginformation.summary: [junit 5] Add @Suite support from JUnit 5.8.1
buginformation.description: JUnit 5.8.1 now supports the @Suite annotation for a class with additional annotations such as @SelectClasses, @SelectPackages, @SuiteDisplayName.

buginformation.summary: Cursor positioning in lambda completion
[16] New Java Record creation wizard not creating stubs for inherited abstract methods on request
buginformation.description:
In the New Java Record creation Wizard, there is an option provided under 'Which method stubs would you like to create?' to create 'inherited abstract methods' stubs.
Selecting this and creating a record should create method stubs for
1) public boolean equals(Object obj) 2) public int hashCode() 3) public String toString()
which are abstract methods sin java.lang.Record.
but currently these method stubs are not created.
The right behaviour is that when the option to create these method stubs is selected, the above method stubs also need to be created in the Record.

buginformation.summary: [16] Provide option in New Record Creation Wizard to create stubs for the main function.
buginformation.description:
Currently there is no option provided in New Record Creation Wizard to create stubs for
public static void main(String []args) at the time of record creation.
This support is there in New Class Creation Wizard. Similar support needs to be added to New Record Creation Wizard.

buginformation.summary: [formatting] Add formatting setting for whitespace in permits clause - UI
buginformation.description: The UI part for bug 576373

buginformation.summary: [content assist] Quick Fix to add a static import to the list of content assist favorites
buginformation.description:
Created attachment 287503 content assist on static imports
It would be nice to easily add a statically imported class to my list of favorites.
Hence, I propose a quick fix in the java editor on a static import line so that the user can add this class to content assist favorites effortlessly. Currently, there is no quick fix at all available.

buginformation.summary: partially qualified names need a asterisk wildcard to be found by Open Type dialog
buginformation.description:
Bug 447798 converts "C:\org.eclipse.debug.core\bin\org\eclipse\debug\core\DebugPlugin$EventDispatchJob.class" to DebugPlugin.EventDispatchJob but that class is not found by the Open Type dialog.
Alternative search pattern which find org.eclipse.debug.core.DebugPlugin.EventDispatchJob: .DebugPlugin.EventDispatchJob *.DebugPlugin.EventDispatchJob *DebugPlugin.EventDispatchJob I am not sure about the differences but i suggest to automatically prepend *. when the resulting search text contains ".".
i.e. Map$Entry -) *.Map.Entry

buginformation.summary: [17] Provide quick fixes to add permitted class/interface for sealed class/interface
buginformation.description: I create a "sealed" class C1 without any permits. This shows compilation error "Sealed class or interface lacks the permits clause and no class or interface from the same compilation unit declares test1 as its direct superclass or superinterface" But I don't see any corresponding quick fix, it will be good to see 2 quickfixes. One to create class in the same compilation unit and other one to create a child class in the same package.

buginformation.summary: Refactor SwitchExpressionsFix.createConvertToSwitchExpressionFix to jdt.core.manipulation
buginformation.description: The static method: SwitchExpressionsFix.createConvertToSwitchExpressionFix() method is used by the QuickAssistProcessor. The jdt.ls team wishes to use this quick assist and has requested this static method be moved to jdt.core.manipulation via the SwitchExpressionsFixCore class. In addition, the quick assist uses a QuickAssistProcessor utility getIndex() which can be moved to QuickAssistProcessorUtil in jdt.core.manipulation.

buginformation.summary: [extract method] Entire lambda body cannot be extracted
Source -) Clean-up rule "Remove unnecessary parentheses" on Java 16 instanceof pattern matching
Dead code in the equals method of RequiredProjectWrapper
[call hierarchy] show subtype hierarchies for Call Hierarchy with Callee Hierarchy
Source clean-up save actions swallow comment when adding brackets
[formatter] Wrong indentation for method invocation on multi-line expression - UI
buginformation.description: UI part for bug 577117

buginformation.summary: [formatter] Case statement in switch expression is not line wrapped - UI
buginformation.description: UI part for bug 578044

buginformation.summary: [Code Clean-Up] "Reduce indentation" is missing expression
[Code Clean-Up] "Make inner classes static where possible" results into compilation failure
[Code Clean-Up] "Reduce indentation" fails
buginformation.description:
Consider the example below:
public class Test { public static void main(String[] args) { if (args != null) if (args.length == 0) System.out.println("no args"); else throw new IllegalArgumentException(); // remove this comment or add enclosing brackets to make clean-up successful } }
When I do "Source-)Clean-up", and choose "reduce indentation" under "code style" tab, the refactoring fails with the following stacktrace:
java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException at org.eclipse.jface.operation.ModalContext.run(ModalContext.java:395) at org.eclipse.jface.wizard.WizardDialog.run(WizardDialog.java:1033) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.RefactoringWizard.createChange(RefactoringWizard.java:662) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.RefactoringWizard.computeUserInputSuccessorPage(RefactoringWizard.java:504) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.UserInputWizardPage.computeSuccessorPage(UserInputWizardPage.java:77) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.UserInputWizardPage.getNextPage(UserInputWizardPage.java:113) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.CleanUpRefactoringWizard$CleanUpConfigurationPage.getNextPage(CleanUpRefactoringWizard.java:437) at org.eclipse.jface.wizard.WizardDialog.nextPressed(WizardDialog.java:910) at org.eclipse.jface.wizard.WizardDialog.buttonPressed(WizardDialog.java:468) at org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog.lambda$0(Dialog.java:619) at org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionListener$1.widgetSelected(SelectionListener.java:84) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.TypedListener.handleEvent(TypedListener.java:252) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.EventTable.sendEvent(EventTable.java:89) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.sendEvent(Display.java:4243) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.sendEvent(Widget.java:1060) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runDeferredEvents(Display.java:4060) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:3632) at org.eclipse.jface.window.Window.runEventLoop(Window.java:823) at org.eclipse.jface.window.Window.open(Window.java:799) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.lambda$0(RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.java:190) at org.eclipse.swt.custom.BusyIndicator.showWhile(BusyIndicator.java:74) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.run(RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.java:209) at org.eclipse.ltk.ui.refactoring.RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.run(RefactoringWizardOpenOperation.java:126) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.refactoring.actions.RefactoringStarter.activate(RefactoringStarter.java:41) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.corext.refactoring.RefactoringExecutionStarter.startCleanupRefactoring(RefactoringExecutionStarter.java:257) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.actions.AllCleanUpsAction.performRefactoring(AllCleanUpsAction.java:71) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.actions.CleanUpAction.run(CleanUpAction.java:180) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.actions.CleanUpAction.run(CleanUpAction.java:101) at org.eclipse.jdt.ui.actions.SelectionDispatchAction.dispatchRun(SelectionDispatchAction.java:278) at org.eclipse.jdt.ui.actions.SelectionDispatchAction.run(SelectionDispatchAction.java:252) at org.eclipse.jface.action.Action.runWithEvent(Action.java:474) at org.eclipse.jface.action.ActionContributionItem.handleWidgetSelection(ActionContributionItem.java:580) at org.eclipse.jface.action.ActionContributionItem.lambda$4(ActionContributionItem.java:414) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.EventTable.sendEvent(EventTable.java:89) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.sendEvent(Display.java:4243) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.sendEvent(Widget.java:1060) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runDeferredEvents(Display.java:4060) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:3632) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine$5.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1154) at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:338) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1045) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.E4Workbench.createAndRunUI(E4Workbench.java:155) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.lambda$3(Workbench.java:644) at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:338) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.createAndRunWorkbench(Workbench.java:551) at org.eclipse.ui.PlatformUI.createAndRunWorkbench(PlatformUI.java:156) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.ide.application.IDEApplication.start(IDEApplication.java:152) at org.eclipse.equinox.internal.app.EclipseAppHandle.run(EclipseAppHandle.java:203) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.internal.adaptor.EclipseAppLauncher.runApplication(EclipseAppLauncher.java:136) at org.eclipse.text.edits.MalformedTreeException: Range of child edit lies outside of parent edit at org.eclipse.text.edits.TextEdit.internalAdd(TextEdit.java:780) at org.eclipse.text.edits.TextEdit.addChild(TextEdit.java:340) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.addEdit(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:350) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.doTextRemove(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:410) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.doTextRemoveAndVisit(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:418) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.rewriteBodyNode(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:943) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.visit(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:3010) at org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.IfStatement.accept0(IfStatement.java:178) at org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTNode.accept(ASTNode.java:3129) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.voidVisit(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:453) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewriteAnalyzer.doTextRemoveAndVisit(ASTRewriteAnalyzer.java:421) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.corext.fix.CleanUpRefactoring$CleanUpASTRequestor.calculateSolutions(CleanUpRefactoring.java:301) at buginformation.summary: [Code Clean-Up] "Convert to switch expression where possible" discards assignments
[Code Clean-Up] "Convert to switch expression where possible" result missing the default case
[Code Clean-Up] "Convert to switch expression where possible" swallows comments
[cleanup] Text block cleanup fails on string ending with backslash
[Code Clean-Up] "Convert if/else if/else chain to switch" results into compilation failure
[Code Clean-Up] "Remove unused local variables" results into compilation failure
[Code Clean-Up] "Use '==' or '^' on booleans" results into compilation failure
[18] Allow JDT to target Java 18 in compiler preferences
buginformation.description: Add "18 (BETA)" on the Compiler preferences page and show the corresponding disclaimer when it is selected.

buginformation.summary: Outline selection invalidates enclosing project for search
buginformation.description:
Version: 2021-12 (4.22) Build id: I20211124-1800
While editing a Java file, use of Search-)File offers Enclosing Project as a search context.
However after selecting an outline entry, this option is lost. Surely the enclosing project should still be available?
repro:
Edit a Java file. Left click an outline entry. Search-)File -- Enclosing Project radio box is greyed out

buginformation.summary: [formatter] Keep braced code on one line: settings for new switch constructs - UI
buginformation.description: The UI part for bug 578361

buginformation.summary: NPE in CPListElement.toString() when changing project classpath JRE to another JRE installation
buginformation.description:
To reproduce:
1. Apply this change:
diff --git a/org.eclipse.jdt.ui/ui/org/eclipse/jdt/internal/ui/wizards/buildpaths/BuildPathBasePage.java b/org.eclipse.jdt.ui/ui/org/eclipse/jdt/internal/ui/wizards/buildpaths/BuildPathBasePage.java index 8cb4a06c0f..9d67b7f4bb 100644 --- a/org.eclipse.jdt.ui/ui/org/eclipse/jdt/internal/ui/wizards/buildpaths/BuildPathBasePage.java +++ b/org.eclipse.jdt.ui/ui/org/eclipse/jdt/internal/ui/wizards/buildpaths/BuildPathBasePage.java @@ -330,6 +330,7 @@ public abstract class BuildPathBasePage { break; rootCPListElement.addCPListElement(selElement); List(CPListElement) all= listField.getElements(); + System.out.println(all); listField.removeAllElements(); listField.setElements(all); listField.refresh();
2. Debug Eclipse, the debuggee Eclipse: 3. Define a separate JRE 8 installation. 4. Create a Java project, default is classpath JRE 11. 5. Change the JRE 11 to JRE 8. 6. Observe NPE:
java.lang.NullPointerException at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.CPListElement.toString(CPListElement.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.String.valueOf(String.java:2951) at java.base/java.lang.StringBuilder.append(StringBuilder.java:168) at java.base/java.util.AbstractCollection.toString(AbstractCollection.java:473) at java.base/java.lang.String.valueOf(String.java:2951) at java.base/java.io.PrintStream.println(PrintStream.java:897) at org.apache.felix.gogo.runtime.threadio.ThreadPrintStream.println(ThreadPrintStream.java:184) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.BuildPathBasePage.moveCPElementAcrossNode(BuildPathBasePage.java:333) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.LibrariesWorkbookPage.editElementEntry(LibrariesWorkbookPage.java:903) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.LibrariesWorkbookPage.editEntry(LibrariesWorkbookPage.java:754) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.LibrariesWorkbookPage.libaryPageCustomButtonPressed(LibrariesWorkbookPage.java:468) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.LibrariesWorkbookPage$LibrariesAdapter.customButtonPressed(LibrariesWorkbookPage.java:403) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.dialogfields.TreeListDialogField.buttonPressed(TreeListDialogField.java:177) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.dialogfields.TreeListDialogField.doButtonSelected(TreeListDialogField.java:412) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.dialogfields.TreeListDialogField$2.widgetSelected(TreeListDialogField.java:373) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.TypedListener.handleEvent(TypedListener.java:252) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.EventTable.sendEvent(EventTable.java:89) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.sendEvent(Display.java:5895) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.sendEvent(Widget.java:1516) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runDeferredEvents(Display.java:5126) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:4581) at org.eclipse.jface.window.Window.runEventLoop(Window.java:823) at org.eclipse.jface.window.Window.open(Window.java:799) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.newsourcepage.ConfigureBuildPathAction.run(ConfigureBuildPathAction.java:88) at org.eclipse.jface.action.Action.runWithEvent(Action.java:474) at org.eclipse.jface.action.ActionContributionItem.handleWidgetSelection(ActionContributionItem.java:580) at org.eclipse.jface.action.ActionContributionItem.lambda$4(ActionContributionItem.java:414) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.EventTable.sendEvent(EventTable.java:89) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.sendEvent(Display.java:5895) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.sendEvent(Widget.java:1516) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runDeferredEvents(Display.java:5126) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:4581) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine$5.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1154) at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:338) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1045) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.E4Workbench.createAndRunUI(E4Workbench.java:155) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.lambda$3(Workbench.java:644) at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:338) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.createAndRunWorkbench(Workbench.java:551) at org.eclipse.ui.PlatformUI.createAndRunWorkbench(PlatformUI.java:156) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.ide.application.IDEApplication.start(IDEApplication.java:152) at org.eclipse.equinox.internal.app.EclipseAppHandle.run(EclipseAppHandle.java:203) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.internal.adaptor.EclipseAppLauncher.runApplication(EclipseAppLauncher.java:136) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.internal.adaptor.EclipseAppLauncher.start(EclipseAppLauncher.java:104) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.adaptor.EclipseStarter.run(EclipseStarter.java:401) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.adaptor.EclipseStarter.run(EclipseStarter.java:255) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:566) at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.invokeFramework(Main.java:659) at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.basicRun(Main.java:596) at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.run(Main.java:1467) at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.main(Main.java:1440)
This NPE makes debugging in BuildPathBasePage.moveCPElementAcrossNode() very difficult, as toString() no longer works with the reproduction sequence. So all hovers show "an invocation exception occurred in remote JVM" instead of actual text for elements of type CPListElement.

buginformation.summary: Changing classpath to another installed JRE results in classpath re-ordering
buginformation.description:
Created attachment 287938 Screenshot after changing JRE to 8.
To reproduce:
1. Define a separate JRE 8 installation. 2. Create a Java project, default is classpath JRE 11. 3. Change the JRE 11 to JRE 8. 4. Observe the order of elements on the classpath changed.

buginformation.summary: Refactor SubstringCleanup to jdt.core.manipulation
buginformation.description: Create a core version of the cleanup in the jdt.core.manipulation package and forward the existing cleanup to use that new version

buginformation.summary: [Spock][JUnit 5][m2e] Run as JUnit Test broken
buginformation.description:
Created attachment 287960 Example project to reproduce
This action was working fine in 4.21 using Groovy Eclipse 4.4.0 and m2e. In 4.22, I have the following stack when running a Junit test configuration:
org.junit.platform.commons.JUnitException: TestEngine with ID 'junit-jupiter' failed to discover tests at org.junit.platform.launcher.core.EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.discoverEngineRoot(EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.java:111) at org.junit.platform.launcher.core.EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.discover(EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.java:85) at org.junit.platform.launcher.core.DefaultLauncher.discover(DefaultLauncher.java:92) at org.junit.platform.launcher.core.DefaultLauncher.discover(DefaultLauncher.java:67) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit5.runner.JUnit5TestReference.(init)(JUnit5TestReference.java:46) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit5.runner.JUnit5TestLoader.createTest(JUnit5TestLoader.java:96) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit5.runner.JUnit5TestLoader.loadTests(JUnit5TestLoader.java:48) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit.runner.RemoteTestRunner.runTests(RemoteTestRunner.java:513) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit.runner.RemoteTestRunner.runTests(RemoteTestRunner.java:756) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit.runner.RemoteTestRunner.run(RemoteTestRunner.java:452) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.junit.runner.RemoteTestRunner.main(RemoteTestRunner.java:210) Caused by: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: org/junit/jupiter/api/TestInstance$Lifecycle at org.junit.jupiter.engine.JupiterTestEngine.discover(JupiterTestEngine.java:66) at org.junit.platform.launcher.core.EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.discoverEngineRoot(EngineDiscoveryOrchestrator.java:103) ... 10 more Caused by: java.lang.ClassNotFoundException: org.junit.jupiter.api.TestInstance$Lifecycle at java.base/jdk.internal.loader.BuiltinClassLoader.loadClass(BuiltinClassLoader.java:581) at java.base/jdk.internal.loader.ClassLoaders$AppClassLoader.loadClass(ClassLoaders.java:178) at java.base/java.lang.ClassLoader.loadClass(ClassLoader.java:522) ... 12 more
It looks like the jupiter-api is not included in the classpath anymore ? I can work around the issue by adding the Junit 5 library in the classpath or adding the jupiter-api dependency in my pom, but it seems not acceptable.
You can import the project in attachment to reproduce the issue.

buginformation.summary: [open type] Make TypeInfoFilter more robust when a class is specified without a package in Open Type Dialog
buginformation.description:
Currently if there is the following innerclass:
Test.TestInner1.TestInner2
Specifying Test.TestInner1.TestInner2 in the Open Type dialog works and so does TestInner1 or TestInner2 by themselves
Specifying TestInner1.TestInner2 does not. Currently, TestInner1 is treated as a package name since it has a dot after it. If the TypeInfoFilter assumes that upper-case names are not packages, this scenario plus others will work.

buginformation.summary: Refactor clean ups that only forward to core clean ups
buginformation.description:
There is quite a bit of code that is the same among the clean-ups that forward their implementation to a core clean-up.
The idea is to share this code in a new common superclass for those clean-ups.

buginformation.summary: Move occurrence finders to jdt.core.manipulation
buginformation.description:
The following occurrence finders have no UI dependencies and can be moved to jdt.core.manipulation:
- BreakContinueTargetFinder - ExceptionOccurrencesFinder - ImplementOccurrencesFinder - MethodExitsFinder
This allows for reuse in jdt.ls, see https://github.com/eclipse/eclipse.jdt.ls/pull/1941.

buginformation.summary: [JUnit] Re-enable button to re-run failed first for JUnit 5
buginformation.description:
With https://bugs.eclipse.org/bugs/show_bug.cgi?id=518052 the non-functioning button "Rerun Test - Failures first" if using JUnit 5 got "fixed" by disabling the button.
The corresponding JUnit-Issue: https://github.com/junit-team/junit5/issues/884 resulted in re-opening of https://github.com/junit-team/junit5/issues/13, that got some attention, and in the meantime got closed as JUnit 5 has the ability to run tests in a certain order since several versions/years.
Thus I'd like to request to re-enable the option in eclipse, making use of the new JUnit-5-API. :-)

buginformation.summary: Localization popup complains about missing key when using String constants
[18] Merge from master to BETA_JAVA18 Periodically
buginformation.description: Merge periodically from master to BETA_JAVA18

buginformation.summary: [cleanup] convert fields to local var if only used locally causes error if transient modifier used
[cleanup] Remove unused local in for loop causes compile error
[cleanup] Unboxing cleanup causes compile error
[cleanup] Convert to enhanced for loop isn't correctly removing element declaration
[cleanup] Remove unnecessary casts can cause compile error if assigning to self
[cleanup] Use valueOf() instead of instantiation needs to use parentheses
[18][javadoc] incorrect handling of overlapping multiple annotations within @snippet
buginformation.description:
in the snippet below
The below scenario
/** * {@snippet: * System.out.println(); // @highlight substring="out.println" @replace regex="out" replacement="in" * } */
the string ".println" should be in bold
but "in.println" is in bold, which is not the desired behavior.

buginformation.summary: [18] QuickFixTest17 - 12 tests fail in the BETA_JAVA18 gerrit builds
buginformation.description:
The below tests
1)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.core.HierarchicalASTVisitorTest.test 2)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperTypeProposal1 3)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperTypeProposal2 4)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperTypeProposal3 5)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperTypeProposal4 6)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperInterface1 7)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperInterface2 8)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperInterface3 9)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperInterface4 10)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testDoNotAddRecordAsSubType 11)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddSealedAsDirectSuperClass1 12)org.eclipse.jdt.ui.tests.quickfix.QuickFixTest17.testAddRecordAsSubType
fail in the BTA_JAVA18 gerrit builds

buginformation.summary: [cleanup] Use declaring class as qualifier should not reference package-private class
Hover UI Freeze waiting for indexer
buginformation.description:
i just stumpled on a freeze where UI thread TextViewerHoverManager is waiting for the jdt indexer. This must not happen in the UI thread. I could wait hours.
"main" #1 prio=6 os_prio=0 cpu=83812.50ms elapsed=2996.09s tid=0x0000020ae2c7b800 nid=0x5124 in Object.wait() [0x000000ee96ffc000] java.lang.Thread.State: TIMED_WAITING (on object monitor) at java.lang.Object.wait(java.base@11.0.9.1/Native Method) - waiting on (no object reference available) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.processing.JobManager.performConcurrentJob(JobManager.java:284) - waiting to re-lock in wait() (0x0000000744d78898) (a org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.indexing.IndexManager) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.BasicSearchEngine.findMatches(BasicSearchEngine.java:235) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.BasicSearchEngine.search(BasicSearchEngine.java:602) at org.eclipse.jdt.core.search.SearchEngine.search(SearchEngine.java:670) at org.eclipse.pde.internal.ui.correction.java.FindClassResolutionsOperation.findValidPackagesContainingSimpleType(FindClassResolutionsOperation.java:302) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.correction.JavaCorrectionProcessor$SafeCorrectionProcessorAccess.run(JavaCorrectionProcessor.java:341) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.SafeRunner.run(SafeRunner.java:45) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.correction.JavaCorrectionProcessor$SafeCorrectionProcessorAccess.process(JavaCorrectionProcessor.java:336) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.correction.JavaCorrectionProcessor.collectCorrections(JavaCorrectionProcessor.java:465) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.hover.ProblemHover$ProblemInfo.getJavaAnnotationFixes(ProblemHover.java:105) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.hover.ProblemHover$ProblemInfo.getCompletionProposals(ProblemHover.java:79) at org.eclipse.jface.text.AbstractInformationControlManager.presentInformation(AbstractInformationControlManager.java:1120) at org.eclipse.jface.text.AbstractHoverInformationControlManager.presentInformation(AbstractHoverInformationControlManager.java:884) at org.eclipse.jface.text.TextViewerHoverManager.doPresentInformation(TextViewerHoverManager.java:237) at org.eclipse.jface.text.TextViewerHoverManager.lambda$3(TextViewerHoverManager.java:227) at org.eclipse.jface.text.TextViewerHoverManager$$Lambda$1538/0x000000080145b040.run(Unknown Source) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.RunnableLock.run(RunnableLock.java:40) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Synchronizer.runAsyncMessages(Synchronizer.java:185) - locked (0x00000007610012c8) (a org.eclipse.swt.widgets.RunnableLock) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runAsyncMessages(Display.java:4035) at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:3635) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1045) at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.E4Workbench.createAndRunUI(E4Workbench.java:155) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.lambda$3(Workbench.java:644) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench$$Lambda$217/0x00000008003d1040.run(Unknown Source) at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:338) at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.createAndRunWorkbench(Workbench.java:551) at buginformation.summary: [content assist] Adopt CompletionProposal new API to allow filtering types before creating certain proposals
Fix typos seen in Holger video
buginformation.description: Some typos were discovered by Mike Keppler and should be fixed.

buginformation.summary: Bindings.visitHierarchy misses some interfaces
Remove unused code in BuildPathsBlock
buginformation.description: There is unused code in BuildPathsBlock.java

buginformation.summary: [dogfooding] Use Charset.defaultCharset() instead of System.getProperty("file.encoding")
buginformation.description: Use system properties cleanup to remove usage of System.getProperty("file.encoding")

buginformation.summary: [cleanup] Simplify lambda expression creates invalid statement
[javadoc] RefactoringWizard: Resolve reference to deprecated constant
buginformation.description: Documentation is pointing to the deprecated DIALOG_BASED_UESR_INTERFACE constant. Change to: DIALOG_BASED_USER_INTERFACE

buginformation.summary: Remove Code Duplication between ...Fix and ...FixCore
buginformation.description: We have some duplicated code between classes like ConvertLoopFix and ConvertLoopFixCore. We should clean these up to prevent the two locations from getting out of sync.

buginformation.summary: fix minor typo in StringButtonStatusDialogField Javadoc
buginformation.description: The Javadoc for StringButtonStatusDialogField has some minor typo errors

buginformation.summary: [completion] wrong setting of relevance for created type proposal
Regression: Fix for 578788 causes regression in NLS hover
buginformation.description: The fix for Bug 578788 causes a regression in hovering on message constants from a Class that extends NLS. Problem found in I20220406 build.

buginformation.summary: NPE in MatchLocator.findIndexMatches(MatchLocator.java:306)
buginformation.description:
Found this in my workspace log.
The null is coming most likely from org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.indexing.IndexManager.cleanUpIndexes() where some dummy job is created with null pattern (looks like a hack):
PatternSearchJob job = new PatternSearchJob(null, SearchEngine.getDefaultSearchParticipant(), scope, null);
However, the code in org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.PatternSearchJob.search(Index, IndexQueryRequestor, IProgressMonitor) and other places didn't even knows that pattern can be null!!!
This hack in IndexManager.cleanUpIndexes() needs some fix.
eclipse.buildId=4.24.0.I20220407-0240 java.version=11.0.10 java.vendor=Red Hat, Inc. BootLoader constants: OS=linux, ARCH=x86_64, WS=gtk, NL=en_US Command-line arguments: -data /data/4x_platform_workspace -os linux -ws gtk -arch x86_64
org.eclipse.jdt.ui Error Thu Apr 07 17:57:38 CEST 2022 Problems occurred when invoking code from plug-in: "org.eclipse.jdt.ui".
java.lang.NullPointerException at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.matching.MatchLocator.findIndexMatches(MatchLocator.java:306) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.PatternSearchJob.search(PatternSearchJob.java:238) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.PatternSearchJob.execute(PatternSearchJob.java:118) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.processing.JobManager.performConcurrentJob(JobManager.java:300) at org.eclipse.jdt.internal.core.search.BasicSearchEngine.findMatches(BasicSearchEngine.java:235) org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.correction.JavaCorrectionProcessor$SafeCorrectionProcessorAccess.run(JavaCorrectionProcessor.java:341) at org.eclipse.core.runtime.SafeRunner.run(SafeRunner.java:45)
